55762276.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300

412710123.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
412710123.en_literal: I'm not gonna let you get away with that!

574320772.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
574320772.jp_real: フフフ、これも日々の鍛錬の成果だよ。

761203445.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900

11462334.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600

618574644.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800

618574644.english: Yep, we call that tailor-made cover fire!

444987318.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900

761050810.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300

390253318.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500

652047774.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
652047774.jp_real: 俺より遥か年上な六龍から見れば、ちっぽけなもんだろうがな。

954621493.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700

447152810.en_literal: Hahahaha! So you're the one who came!
447152810.english: Yeah! Sure! Has a nice ring to it!

284252441.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400

284252441.en_literal: That's one hell of a satisfying explosion, Gallanza!

722183428.label: PL0500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500

722183428.en_literal: Oh, leave the next one to me!
